title: Delta Sharing supports sharing tables and schemas secured by ABAC policies (Beta)
body:
Delta Sharing providers can now add tables and schemas secured by attribute-based access control (ABAC) to a Delta share. The policy does not govern the recipient's access, so recipients have full access to the shared asset. Recipients can apply their own ABAC policies.

See [Add tables and schemas secured by ABAC policies to a share](/aws/en/opensharing/create-share#abac) and [Read ABAC-secured data and apply ABAC policies](/aws/en/opensharing/read-data-databricks#abac).

ref_links.text: Add tables and schemas secured by ABAC policies to a share
Read ABAC-secured data and apply ABAC policies
